# Take Time — AI Study Planner

> Take Time is a personal study planner with an MCP Server (22 tools), CLI, and PWA. All interfaces share the same Supabase relational database.

## Architecture

```
App (PWA)  ←→  Supabase (PostgreSQL + PostgREST + RLS)  ←→  MCP Server (stdio)
                          ↑                                       ↑
                     CLI (terminal)                     AI Assistants (Claude, etc.)
```

All data lives in relational tables: subjects, subject_items, blocks, profiles, priorities, logs.
Row Level Security ensures each user only sees their own data.

## Core Concepts

### Subjects (Activities)
Three types:
- **study** — has syllabus (topics with pending/completed status)
- **training** — has exercises (name, sets, reps, weight)
- **inactive** (routine) — has checklist (micro-habits with done status)

Each subject has: id, name, type, color, slots, sort_order.

### Blocks (Schedule)
Time-boxed sessions linked to a subject:
- id, subject_id, date (YYYY-MM-DD), start_time (HH:MM), end_time (HH:MM)
- topic (optional label), done (boolean), repeat_daily (boolean)
- completed_items (array of item IDs checked off during this block)

### Priority Circle
Focus areas organized into zones:
- **zone1** (Main Focus) — max 3 items
- **zone2** (Important)
- **zone3** (Flexible)
- **unallocated**

### Subject Items
Content within subjects:
- Study → syllabus topics (name, done status)
- Training → exercises (name, sets, reps, weight)
- Routine → micro-habits (name, done status)

## MCP Server — 22 Tools

Package: `@taketimemcp/mcp-server` (v1.6.0)
Auth: TAKETIME_REFRESH_TOKEN or TAKETIME_EMAIL + TAKETIME_PASSWORD

### Read Tools (7)
- **list_blocks** — List blocks by date/range/subject/status. Default: today.
- **list_subjects** — List activities with items, completion counts.
- **get_schedule** — Full weekly schedule organized by day. week_offset param.
- **get_stats** — Completion rate, streak, top subjects. period: today/week/month/all.
- **get_heatmap** — Daily completion counts with intensity levels 0-4. days param (default 90).
- **get_priorities** — Priority circle by zone.
- **get_logs** — Recent activity log (limit param, default 20).
- **get_settings** — User profile settings (theme, language, timezone, etc.).

### Write Tools — Blocks (3)
- **create_block** — Create block (subject_name, date, start, end, topic). Checks conflicts.
- **update_block** — Update block fields (block_id, start, end, topic, done, repeat_daily).
- **delete_block** — Delete a block (block_id).

### Write Tools — Subjects (3)
- **create_subject** — Create activity (name, type, color, slots).
- **update_subject** — Update activity (subject_name, new_name, color, slots).
- **delete_subject** — Delete activity + cascade blocks + remove matching priorities.

### Write Tools — Items (3)
- **add_subject_item** — Add item (subject_name + topic/name/task based on type, sets, reps, weight).
- **update_subject_item** — Update item (item_id, topic/name/task, status, sets, reps, weight).
- **remove_subject_item** — Remove item (subject_name, item_id).

### Write Tools — Atomic Habits (1)
- **toggle_block_item** — Check/uncheck an item within a block. Auto-completes block when all items done.

### Write Tools — Priorities (3)
- **add_priority_item** — Add to a zone (name, zone). Zone1 max 3.
- **remove_priority_item** — Remove (item_id).
- **move_priority_item** — Move between zones (item_id, target_zone).

### Write Tools — Settings (1)
- **update_setting** — Update profile (notifications, reminder_min, theme, show_marquee, timezone, language).

## CLI — @taketime/cli

Install: `npm install -g @taketime/cli`

### Commands
- `taketime login` — Authenticate
- `taketime today` — Today's timeline + progress + main focus
- `taketime quick "Name" HH:MM HH:MM` — Quick block creation
- `taketime schedule [--week=0]` — Weekly view with time distribution
- `taketime blocks [--date=YYYY-MM-DD]` — List blocks
- `taketime blocks create/done/update/delete` — Block CRUD
- `taketime subjects` — List activities with progress bars
- `taketime subjects show/create/update/delete` — Activity CRUD
- `taketime items add/update/toggle/remove` — Item management
- `taketime priorities` — Priority circle view
- `taketime priorities add/move/remove` — Priority management
- `taketime stats [today|week|month|all]` — Completion stats
- `taketime heatmap [--days=90]` — GitHub-style heatmap
- `taketime settings [set]` — View/update settings
- `taketime logs` — Activity log
